name: opc-skills
readme_summary: OPC Skills provides a collection of pre-built AI agent "skills" designed to enhance the capabilities of AI assistants like Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex. These skills are self-contained modules containing instructions, scripts, and resources that AI agents can dynamically load to perform specialized tasks, making them more powerful for solopreneurs and one-person companies.
key_features: Extensible AI agent skills for various coding assistants
Self-contained skill modules with instructions and metadata
Dynamic loading of skills by AI agents
Includes skills for SEO/GEO optimization, demand research, domain hunting, logo creation, banner creation, image generation, and Reddit content retrieval
Supports integration with Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex
primary_use_case: To empower solopreneurs and one-person companies by providing ready-to-use automation skills that enhance the functionality of AI coding assistants for tasks like marketing, content creation, and research.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan in a workshop, holding a glowing blueprint labeled 'OPC Skills'. They are using a magical chisel to imbue a generic AI assistant robot with specialized tools and capabilities, represented by glowing icons for SEO, design, and research appearing on the robot's chassis. The robot is transforming raw data (represented by scattered digital particles) into polished outputs like website banners and logos. The background shows a clean, modern workspace with subtle code snippets on screens. The overall mood is one of empowerment and enhanced productivity for a solo operator. 3D isometric illustration style with vibrant, clean colors.

name: jmeter
description: Apache JMeter open-source load testing tool for analyzing and measuring the performance of a variety of services
readme_summary: Apache JMeter is an open-source Java application designed for performance and load testing of various services. It simulates heavy loads to analyze application strength and performance under different conditions, offering a comprehensive feature set for detailed testing and reporting.
key_features: Performance and load testing for web applications, web services, FTP, JDBC, LDAP, MOM, Mail, and more
Fully featured Test IDE for recording, building, and debugging test plans
Command-line mode (non-GUI) for load testing from any Java-compatible OS
Dynamic HTML reporting and live reporting to third-party databases
Easy correlation for extracting data from various response formats (HTML, JSON, XML, text)
Highly extensible core with scriptable samplers (Groovy), pluggable tiers, and data analysis plugins
primary_use_case: Performance and load testing of applications and services to measure their strength and analyze overall performance under simulated heavy loads.
cover_image_prompt: A powerful, stylized anvil labeled 'JMeter' is actively being struck by a series of rapidly descending hammers, each representing a simulated user. The anvil is placed on a sturdy, digital platform, and beneath it, a complex network of pipes and gears representing a web server is visibly straining under the impact, with some parts glowing red. Data streams, visualized as glowing blue particles, flow from the hammers to the anvil and then into the straining server infrastructure. In the background, a clean, minimalist dashboard displays real-time graphs and metrics showing the server's stress levels. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clear visual metaphor, vibrant but controlled colors, and subtle digital effects to convey performance under pressure.

name: GLM-Image
description: GLM-Image: Auto-regressive for Dense-knowledge and High-fidelity Image Generation.
readme_summary: GLM-Image is an advanced image generation model that utilizes a hybrid autoregressive and diffusion decoder architecture. It excels in generating high-fidelity images, particularly those requiring precise semantic understanding, complex information expression, and accurate text rendering, while also supporting a wide array of image-to-image tasks.
key_features: Hybrid autoregressive + diffusion decoder architecture
9B-parameter autoregressive generator initialized from GLM-4-9B-0414
7B-parameter diffusion decoder based on DiT architecture
Glyph Encoder text module for accurate text rendering
Post-training with decoupled reinforcement learning (GRPO) for enhanced semantic understanding and visual detail
Supports both text-to-image and image-to-image generation
Image-to-image tasks include editing, style transfer, identity-preserving generation, and multi-subject consistency
primary_use_case: High-fidelity and knowledge-intensive image generation from text, with advanced capabilities in text rendering and a comprehensive suite of image-to-image editing and manipulation functionalities.
cover_image_prompt: A master artisan sculptor in a futuristic workshop, meticulously carving intricate details into a block of pure light. On one side, glowing runes and complex schematics (representing text and knowledge inputs) are fed into the sculptor's tools. On the other side, the light block transforms into a hyper-realistic, detailed image, complete with perfectly rendered text. Subtle digital particles and UI elements displaying 'GLM-Image' float around the scene, hinting at the underlying AI technology. The overall mood is one of creation and precision, with a clean, modern aesthetic and vibrant, glowing accents. 3D isometric illustration style.

name: LLMRouter
description: LLMRouter: An Open-Source Library for LLM Routing
readme_summary: LLMRouter is an open-source Python library designed for intelligent routing of Large Language Model (LLM) inferences. It dynamically selects the most suitable LLM for a given query based on factors like complexity, cost, and performance, supporting over 16 diverse routing models and offering a unified CLI for training, inference, and chat.
key_features: Smart Routing: Automatically routes queries to the optimal LLM based on task complexity, cost, and performance.
Multiple Router Models: Support for over 16 routing models across single-round, multi-round, agentic, and personalized categories.
Unified CLI: Command-line interface for training, inference, and interactive chat with Gradio UI.
Data Generation Pipeline: Complete pipeline for generating training data from benchmark datasets with automatic API calling and evaluation.
ComfyUI Interface: Visual interface for constructing data generation and routing pipelines.
OpenClaw Router Integration: OpenAI-compatible server deployment with multimodal understanding and retrieval-augmented routing memory.
primary_use_case: Optimizing LLM inference by intelligently routing queries to the most appropriate language model.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, ancient librarian stands at a grand crossroads, holding a glowing orb that represents an incoming user query. The crossroads have multiple paths, each leading to a different, stylized library section, symbolizing various LLMs (e.g., one section has futuristic glowing books for advanced models, another has simpler scrolls for basic models). The librarian consults a small, holographic tablet displaying complex decision trees and data points, then points the user query orb down the most efficient path. Subtle digital particles flow from the orb towards the chosen path. The scene is set in a grand, slightly mystical library with warm, inviting lighting. The style is a 3D isometric illustration with rich details and a clear, intuitive composition, emphasizing the 'LLMRouter' name subtly etched on the librarian's desk.

name: tuitube
description: Download videos from the command line with a TUI
readme_summary: Tuitube is a command-line interface (CLI) tool that provides a Text User Interface (TUI) for downloading videos from various popular platforms like YouTube, X (Twitter), Twitch, and Instagram. It leverages the power of yt-dlp to handle the actual downloading process.
key_features: TUI for video downloads
Supports YouTube, X (Twitter), Twitch, Instagram, Bilibili, and more
Uses yt-dlp CLI for downloading
Cross-platform compatibility (macOS, Windows)
primary_use_case: Downloading videos from various online platforms through an easy-to-use text-based interface.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, stylized robot character sitting at a minimalist desk, holding a universal remote control. The robot is pointing the remote at a holographic projection of various social media logos (YouTube, X, Twitch, Instagram). From the remote, a beam of light is downloading stylized video file icons into a sleek, modern hard drive on the desk. Subtle digital particles and faint code snippets float in the background, hinting at the underlying technology. The scene is brightly lit with a clean, modern aesthetic, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with vibrant colors and clear, friendly character design. The repository name 'tuitube' is subtly integrated into the design of the hard drive.
